phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Jan Hus Memorial area clears for events
phrases.text_local: Kdy se u pomníku uvolní místo?
phrases.cultural_note: The area around the Jan Hus Memorial is a popular gathering spot, and temporary events or crowds can block access.

likely_response.local: Po skončení akce, asi za hodinu.
likely_response.translation_en: After the event ends, in about an hour.

responses.english: After the event ends, in about an hour.
responses.french: Po skončení akce, asi za hodinu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to buy Astronomical Clock tower tickets
phrases.text_local: Kde se kupují lístky na orloj?
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for the Old Town Hall tower are sold inside the building at the tourist information center, not at the clock itself.

likely_response.local: V informačním centru v přízemí radnice.
likely_response.translation_en: At the information center on the ground floor of the town hall.

responses.english: At the information center on the ground floor of the town hall.
responses.french: V informačním centru v přízemí radnice.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if souvenir shops here accept haggling
phrases.text_local: Dá se tady v obchodech smlouvat?
phrases.cultural_note: Haggling is more accepted at open-air souvenir stalls than in established brick-and-mortar shops around the square.

likely_response.local: Ve stáncích ano, v kamenných obchodech ne.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes at the stalls, no in the permanent shops.

responses.english: Yes at the stalls, no in the permanent shops.
responses.french: Ve stáncích ano, v kamenných obchodech ne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if terrace seating costs extra
phrases.text_local: Stojí místo na zahrádce něco navíc?
phrases.cultural_note: Some restaurants around the square add a small surcharge for outdoor seating, though not all do.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a ten-crown surcharge.

responses.english: Yes, there is a ten-crown surcharge.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the horse carriage stand is
phrases.cultural_note: Carriage drivers (kočí) often wait near the center of Old Town Square, a short walk from the Astronomical Clock.

likely_response.translation_en: In the middle of the square, opposite the astronomical clock.

responses.english: In the middle of the square, opposite the astronomical clock.
